label: Transparent malachite bands motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Malachite transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a polished malachite mineral motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as one complete subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A malachite stone cross-section with vivid deep green concentric bands, mint-green veins, black mineral shadows, subtle copper-brown matrix traces, glossy polished surface, and crisp natural edges. Geological accuracy, layered copper-mine identity.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show the full banded stone without cropping. Clean studio lighting, no cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no jade, no emerald gemstone, no leaves, no map pattern, no jewelry setting, no hand, no landscape, no text, no watermark, no loose stones.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Malachite light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Malachite", derived from a malachite bands cutout. This board is a source reference for a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible finance UI theme.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Malachite, Malachite Bands, Palette, Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Extract colors and interaction language from deep green malachite bands, mint veins, mineral-black shadows, copper mine traces, and glossy layered stone. The board must read as malachite, not jade, leaf, or generic green finance.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Style: layered finance system, 8px radius, pale mint surfaces, malachite green primary actions, copper trace warning/accent chips, mineral-black text, banded table separators, mint focus rings, dense metrics, subtle concentric stripe texture.
Constraints: no jade stone, no leaf botanical UI, no generic emerald palette, no unrelated neon colors, no blue gradients, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Malachite", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Malachite dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Malachite". It must feel like the light-mode board translated to dark mode and remain derived from the malachite bands cutout.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Malachite, Malachite Bands, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Preserve deep malachite green active states, mint vein focus rings, mineral-black backgrounds, copper trace accents, banded dividers, dense finance dashboard rhythm, and 8px shadcn/tweakcn grid. Must read as malachite, not jade or generic green.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Visual details: mineral-black dark backgrounds, deep ore cards, malachite green buttons, mint vein charts and rings, copper warning chips, pale mint text, subtle concentric band texture, crisp dense controls.
Constraints: no jade, no leaves, no neon cyber green, no pure-black-only flat background, no generic finance template, no illegible tiny paragraphs, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Malachite".
